pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and access newer framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or missing new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer environments.
Remove the exclusion of junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test, likely because it is no longer needed or handled differently in the new Spring Boot version.
Remove explicit version from testcontainers junit-jupiter dependency to rely on the managed version from Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit version from maven-resources-plugin to rely on the managed version from Spring Boot parent.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a newer snapshot version compatible with the build environment.
Remove explicit version from maven-enforcer-plugin to rely on the managed version from Spring Boot parent.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Replace legacy String.format calls with the Java 21 String.formatted method for modern string interpolation.
Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format after migrating to String.formatted.
